summary: Website project that should not redirect users to external websites and must use in-website authentication.
architectural_notes: No external redirects allowed — all navigation and auth flows must stay within the site.
Authentication must be handled in-website (no third-party OAuth redirects or external login pages).
known_issues: Website currently redirects users to external websites; needs to be fixed.

existing_features.title: Audit all navigation links, buttons, and anchor tags across the entire frontend and remove or replace any href, window.location, or navigate calls that point to external URLs (outside the app). All navigation must stay within the single-page application using the internal TanStack Router.

Replace the current Internet Identity authentication flow (which redirects users to identity.ic0.app) with an in-website, modal-based login/signup experience using the existing session-auth system (useSessionAuth). The Login and SignUp pages should be rendered as in-app modal dialogs or inline page sections, never causing a full redirect away from the site. The existing Login.tsx and SignUp.tsx pages can remain but must not trigger external redirects; the Internet Identity login button must not perform an off-site redirect.

Update the AuthChangeBanner component in frontend/src/components/layout/AuthChangeBanner.tsx to reflect that in-website authentication is now active and no external redirects occur. Remove or update any messaging that refers to external login redirects being disabled, since that is now the normal expected behavior.

new_feature_requests.summary: Remove all external redirects; keep all navigation within the website
Implement in-website authentication instead of redirecting to external auth providers
